prompt_md: Match each **AI risk** on the left to the **governance control or mitigation** on the right that most directly addresses it.

left: Staff pasting customer PII into an external AI tool
Unclear who owns the model's output and whether your data trains the vendor's model
A regulated decision (e.g. hiring) must be explainable and accountable later
Confidential source code or credentials leaking to an external service
Nobody knows how many AI tools are in use or what data they touch
right: PII redaction plus an acceptable-use policy on what data may be sent
A reviewed vendor contract settling output ownership and a no-training clause
Audit logging of prompts, outputs, and decisions
Access scoping so confidential data and secrets never reach the tool
An AI use register inventorying every AI use, its data, and its risk tier
